subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Sadiq! Thy remembrance hath come before the Wronged One, and the Most Exalted Pen hath turned toward thee from the precincts of 'Akká [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل صادق ذکرت لدی المظلوم مذکور و قلم اعلی از شطر عکا بتو توجه نموده و
subcodes.subjects: @work as worship, @praise and encouragement, @useful occupation; acquisition of a craft; trade; profession, @excellence; distinction
